whyItMatters: Claude Fable 5 is dead and GPT-5.6 delaying launch… Microsoft has changed the game 🤯 They've open-sourced bitnet.cpp, a 1-bit LLM inference framework. It let's you run 100B parameter models on your local CPU without GPUs. - 6.17x faster inference - 82.2% less energy on CPUs 100% Open Source. · fxtwitter expansion: 901 likes, 94 retweets, 48 replies, 7 quot…
